<?php /** * Concrete end token class. * * @warning This class accepts attributes even though end tags cannot. This * is for optimization reasons, as under normal circumstances, the Lexers * do not pass attributes. */ class HTMLPurifier_Token_End extends HTMLPurifier_Token_Tag { /** * Token that started this node. * Added by MakeWellFormed. Please do not edit this! * @type HTMLPurifier_Token */ public $start; public function toNode() { throw new Exception("HTMLPurifier_Token_End->toNode not supported!"); } } // vim: et sw=4 sts=4
